content:
# AI Stack (Gabe Lens)

Standardized LLM integration patterns enforced across projects.

- Structured output: PydanticAI output_type or Claude tool_choice. Never prompt-only.
- Streaming: all >5s operations emit SSE progress events.
- Model routing: Haiku for classification, Sonnet for complex reasoning, Opus for rare architectural calls. Never user-configurable.
- Observability: Langfuse traces on all production calls with cost + latency + token_count tags.
